name: Beef Bulgogi
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon sesame salt (toasted sesame seeds ground with salt)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, combine soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, sesame salt (toasted sesame seeds ground with salt), black pepper, scallions, garlic, ginger, saki or dry sherry, and red pepper flakes.
2. Add the beef and toss to coat evenly. Marinate for 30 minutes or more.
3. Heat a stove-top grill over medium-high heat until very hot.
4. Add peanut oil to the hot grill.
5. Cook the meat for 1 to 2 minutes on each side, browning it nicely.
6. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds before serving.
